mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar, p.title, CAST(p.content AS CHAR) AS content, p.category, p.tags, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.image_count AS imageCount, p.has_mv AS hasMv, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, CASE WHEN up_top.id IS NOT NULL AND (up_top.expire_time IS NULL OR up_top.expire_time > NOW()) THEN 1 ELSE p.is_top END AS isTop, p.is_hot AS isHot, CASE WHEN up_highlight.id IS NOT NULL AND (up_highlight.expire_time IS NULL OR up_highlight.expire_time > NOW()) THEN true ELSE false END AS isHighlight, upr_color.privilege_value AS nicknameColor, upr_frame.privilege_value AS avatarFrame, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isLiked, CASE WHEN pf.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isFavorited, CASE WHEN upoints.total_points >= 5000 THEN '殿堂级' WHEN upoints.total_points >= 1000 THEN '社区大V' WHEN upoints.total_points >= 500 THEN '音乐达人' WHEN upoints.total_points >= 100 THEN '活跃用户' ELSE '新手' END AS levelName, CASE WHEN upoints.total_points >= 5000 THEN 5 WHEN upoints.total_points >= 1000 THEN 4 WHEN upoints.total_points >= 500 THEN 3 WHEN upoints.total_points >= 100 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS level FROM tb_community_post p LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_user_points upoints ON p.user_id = upoints.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_post_like pl ON p.id = pl.post_id AND pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN tb_post_favorite pf ON p.id = pf.post_id AND pf.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN tb_user_purchase up_top ON p.id = up_top.target_id AND up_top.item_code LIKE 'POST_TOP%' AND up_top.status = 1 LEFT JOIN tb_user_purchase up_highlight ON p.id = up_highlight.target_id AND up_highlight.item_code LIKE 'POST_HIGHLIGHT%' AND up_highlight.status = 1 LEFT JOIN tb_user_privilege upr_color ON p.user_id = upr_color.user_id AND upr_color.privilege_type = 'NICKNAME_COLOR' AND upr_color.is_active = 1 AND (upr_color.expire_time IS NULL OR upr_color.expire_time > NOW()) LEFT JOIN tb_user_privilege upr_frame ON p.user_id = upr_frame.user_id AND upr_frame.privilege_type = 'AVATAR_FRAME' AND upr_frame.is_active = 1 AND (upr_frame.expire_time IS NULL OR upr_frame.expire_time > NOW()) WHERE 1=1
AND p.status = #{status}
AND p.status = 1
AND p.category = #{category}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
AND p.user_id = #{userId}
AND (p.is_hot = 1 OR (up_highlight.id IS NOT NULL AND (up_highlight.expire_time IS NULL OR up_highlight.expire_time > NOW())))
ORDER BY
p.like_count DESC, p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
CASE WHEN up_top.id IS NOT NULL AND (up_top.expire_time IS NULL OR up_top.expire_time > NOW()) THEN 1 ELSE p.is_top END DESC, up_top.purchase_time DESC, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar, p.title, CAST(p.content AS CHAR) AS content, p.category, p.tags, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.image_count AS imageCount, p.has_mv AS hasMv, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, CASE WHEN up_top.id IS NOT NULL AND (up_top.expire_time IS NULL OR up_top.expire_time > NOW()) THEN 1 ELSE p.is_top END AS isTop, p.is_hot AS isHot, CASE WHEN up_highlight.id IS NOT NULL AND (up_highlight.expire_time IS NULL OR up_highlight.expire_time > NOW()) THEN true ELSE false END AS isHighlight, upr_color.privilege_value AS nicknameColor, upr_frame.privilege_value AS avatarFrame, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isLiked, CASE WHEN pf.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isFavorited, CASE WHEN upoints.total_points >= 5000 THEN '殿堂级' WHEN upoints.total_points >= 1000 THEN '社区大V' WHEN upoints.total_points >= 500 THEN '音乐达人' WHEN upoints.total_points >= 100 THEN '活跃用户' ELSE '新手' END AS levelName, CASE WHEN upoints.total_points >= 5000 THEN 5 WHEN upoints.total_points >= 1000 THEN 4 WHEN upoints.total_points >= 500 THEN 3 WHEN upoints.total_points >= 100 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS level FROM tb_community_post p LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_user_points upoints ON p.user_id = upoints.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_post_like pl ON p.id = pl.post_id AND pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN tb_post_favorite pf ON p.id = pf.post_id AND pf.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN tb_user_purchase up_top ON p.id = up_top.target_id AND up_top.item_code LIKE 'POST_TOP%' AND up_top.status = 1 LEFT JOIN tb_user_purchase up_highlight ON p.id = up_highlight.target_id AND up_highlight.item_code LIKE 'POST_HIGHLIGHT%' AND up_highlight.status = 1 LEFT JOIN tb_user_privilege upr_color ON p.user_id = upr_color.user_id AND upr_color.privilege_type = 'NICKNAME_COLOR' AND upr_color.is_active = 1 AND (upr_color.expire_time IS NULL OR upr_color.expire_time > NOW()) LEFT JOIN tb_user_privilege upr_frame ON p.user_id = upr_frame.user_id AND upr_frame.privilege_type = 'AVATAR_FRAME' AND upr_frame.is_active = 1 AND (upr_frame.expire_time IS NULL OR upr_frame.expire_time > NOW()) WHERE p.id = #{postId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) FROM tb_community_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_community_post SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND comment_count > 0
